productDisplayName: Puma Women Saba Ballet Black Shoe
description: Whether you're headed to the track to get your nitro fix or shopping the day away, the women's Saba Ballet from puma will keep you comfy and looking tastefully exquisite!Upper Combination of textile and leather upper for durability Hook-and-loop closure for secure Fit Slip-on style for easy wear Screen-printed puma Jumping cat logo detail Outsole embedded onto the heel cup for better backfoot protection Midsole Soft, cushioned footbed for all day step-in comfort Outsole Racetrack-inspired rubber outsole for traction and performance
